source_citation: Our World in Data — Annual CO2 emissions per country. Data source: Global Carbon Budget (2025). https://ourworldindata.org/co2-and-greenhouse-gas-emissions

x_axis.notes: No explicit x-axis title in source figure; ticks are years.

y_axis.title: Annual CO₂ emissions
y_axis.tick_label_format: 'N billion t' (e.g. '12 billion t'); 0-tick rendered '0 t'.
y_axis.notes: Title taken from chart heading. Tick labels parsed as N*1e9 raw tonnes in data.csv.

subtitle_verbatim: Carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from fossil fuels and industry. Land-use change emissions are not included.
notes: Our World in Data line chart, 7 countries. Legend labels at right of each line's endpoint (no boxed legend). Y-axis tick label format 'N billion t' is parsed as N*1e9 tonnes. Series colors sampled from line pixels at col 695-710.
